entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species targeted for genetic improvement of seed yield and photosynthetic efficiency

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A physiological trait that contributes to the overall seed yield per plant

entities.name: SEED YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The primary agricultural trait being enhanced through genetic dissection

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overarching conceptual framework for improving crop traits using genomic tools

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS PATHWAY GENE-BASED ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to link specific genes in the photosynthesis pathway to traits

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method used to identify genetic variants associated with specific traits across the genome

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify quantitative trait loci associated with complex traits

entities.name: EXPRESSION PROFILING
entities.description: A method used to analyze the expression levels of genes in specific tissues

entities.name: SNP LOCI
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism loci linked to major QTLs

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci that underlie candidate genes associated with PE and SYP

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Specific genes identified as being significantly associated with photosynthetic efficiency and seed yield

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL A-B BINDING PROTEIN-CODING GENE
entities.description: A specific gene that regulates both photosynthetic efficiency and seed yield per plant

entities.name: TIMING OF CAB EXPRESSION 1
entities.description: A gene that interacts with the chlorophyll A-B binding protein-coding gene to modulate traits

entities.name: GENE HAPLOTYPE-SPECIFIC ASSOCIATION
entities.description: A method used to delineate natural alleles and superior haplotypes

entities.name: IN SILICO PROTEIN-PROTEIN INTERACTION STUDY
entities.description: A computational method used to identify interacting proteins or genes

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A method used to develop cultivars with desired traits using molecular markers
